label: Wide 2BR + great room — compact 6-room layout for 16x9 lots (no hallway, great room shares right column with kitchen)

adjacencies.note: bathroom door: 0.6-0.75 m + frame, so 0.75 m shared wall
bedroom door: 0.8-0.9 m + frame, so 0.9 m shared wall (master's east face on the left-wing/right-column dividing line)
bedroom door: 0.8-0.9 m + frame, so 0.9 m shared wall (standard accessed from the great room)
bathroom door: 0.6-0.75 m + frame, so 0.75 m shared wall (common bath publicly accessible from the great room)
common bath shares plumbing wall with kitchen — both at rear, single wet stack
great room and kitchen stacked — kitchen at rear edge, great room in front of it, dividing the right column's 5 m depth between them

notes: Compact 6-room design for the wide 16x9 lot (11x5 buildable = 55 sqm).
Drops the hallway and combines living + dining into a single great room
to free enough area for the LDK on the shallow envelope.
LEFT WING (~6 m wide, full depth split into two bands):
Front band (street side): ensuite (small, far-left) | standard
Rear band:                master (spanning the wing's full width)
RIGHT COLUMN (~5 m wide, full depth split between great room and kitchen):
Front portion:  GREAT ROOM (living/dining combined, hosts entry)
Rear portion:   KITCHEN (against the rear exterior wall)
Plus common bath wedged at the rear of the wing, sharing its
- Master ↔ great room (master's east face is the dividing wall)
- Common bath off the great room
Great room hosts the entry directly (the front door opens into the
combined L+D), since there's no separate living room as the entry.
